settings.label: 01 — Wave
settings.title: Inspired by motion.
settings.body: A signature wave pressed into every panel. Reduces visible scuffing.

settings.label: 02 — Leather
settings.title: Hand-finished corners.
settings.body: Full-grain leather, vegetable-tanned in Tuscany. Stitched by hand.

settings.label: 03 — Wheels
settings.title: Silent skate.
settings.body: 360° polyurethane, sealed bearings, marble to gravel.

settings.label: 04 — Frame
settings.title: Aerospace aluminum.
settings.body: 7000-series, CNC-milled, anodized to a soft satin.

settings.title: Hand-drawn. Then proved.
settings.body: Every silhouette starts on paper. Mock-ups are 3D-printed, weight-balanced, and dropped from six feet a hundred times before a millimeter is committed to metal.

settings.title: Cut from a single sheet.
settings.body: Each panel is CNC-milled from a single billet of 7000-series aluminum. The wave pattern is press-formed, preserving the alloy's structural integrity.

settings.title: Leather, stitched by hand.
settings.body: Full-grain vegetable-tanned leather from a fourth-generation Tuscan tannery. Four hours per case.

settings.title: Eighty-four checks.
settings.body: Wheel rotation. Latch tension. Hinge alignment. Seam pressure. Every case earns the BLN signature on the inner panel.
